---
title: "Blogs & Newsletters"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Blogs & Newsletters

## Sources surveillÃĐes

### Blogs techniques

| Blog | URL | FrÃĐquence | Type |
|------|-----|-----------|------|
| latent.space | `latent.space` | Hebdomadaire | Interviews, analyses |
| Simon Willison | `simonwillison.net` | Quotidien | LLM, agents, tools |
| Anthropic Blog | `anthropic.com/blog` | IrrÃĐgulier | ModÃĻles, research |
| OpenAI Blog | `openai.com/blog` | IrrÃĐgulier | ModÃĻles, research |
| Google AI Blog | `blog.research.google` | IrrÃĐgulier | Research |
| Hugging Face Blog | `huggingface.co/blog` | Hebdomadaire | ModÃĻles, open source |
| Mistral Blog | `mistral.ai/news` | IrrÃĐgulier | ModÃĻles |
| Ollama Blog | `ollama.com/blog` | IrrÃĐgulier | Local LLMs |

### Newsletters

| Newsletter | URL | FrÃĐquence | Source RSS |
|------------|-----|-----------|------------|
| The Batch | `deeplearning.ai/the-batch` | Hebdomadaire | RSS |
| TLDR AI | `tldr.tech/ai` | Quotidien | RSS |
| Import AI | `importai.substack.com` | Hebdomadaire | RSS |
| Ahead of AI | `magazine.sebastianraschka.com` | Mensuel | RSS |
| Last Week in AI | `lastweekin.ai` | Hebdomadaire | RSS |
| The Sequence | `thesequence.substack.com` | Quotidien | RSS |

### AgrÃĐgateurs

| Source | URL | FrÃĐquence |
|--------|-----|-----------|
| Hacker News | `news.ycombinator.com` | Temps rÃĐel |
| Papers With Code | `paperswithcode.com` | Quotidien |
| Reddit r/MachineLearning | `reddit.com/r/MachineLearning` | Quotidien |
| Reddit r/LocalLLaMA | `reddit.com/r/LocalLLaMA` | Quotidien |

## Pipeline RSS

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    RSS[Feeds RSS] --> PARSE[Parser feedparser]
    PARSE --> FILTER[Filtrage mots-clÃĐs]
    FILTER --> SCORE[Scoring pertinence]
    SCORE --> DEDUP[DÃĐduplication]
    DEDUP --> FORMAT[Formatage Markdown]
    FORMAT --> FEED[Page .qmd]
    
    style RSS fill:#1565c0,color:#fff
    style FEED fill:#1b5e20,color:#fff
```

## Mots-clÃĐs de filtrage

| CatÃĐgorie | Mots-clÃĐs |
|-----------|-----------|
| Agentic | `agent`, `agentic`, `autonomous`, `tool calling`, `function calling` |
| LLMs | `GPT`, `Claude`, `Gemini`, `Llama`, `Mistral`, `Qwen`, `DeepSeek` |
| InfÃĐrence | `vLLM`, `SGLang`, `TensorRT`, `Ollama`, `llama.cpp` |
| RAG | `RAG`, `retrieval`, `GraphRAG`, `knowledge graph`, `embedding` |
| MCP | `MCP`, `model context protocol` |
| Code | `code agent`, `coding assistant`, `IDE`, `SWE-bench` |
| Hardware | `GPU`, `H100`, `B200`, `TPU`, `LPU`, `Groq` |

<!-- BLOG_FEED_START -->
### Last Week in AI #341 - Musk loses to OpenAI, Google's IO updates, OpenAI solves ErdÅs
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Wed, 27 May 2026
- **Score** : 3
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Elon Musk Loses $150 Billion Suit Against OpenAI and Sam Altman, Google updates its Gemini app to take on ChatGPT and Claude at IO 2026, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/last-week-in-ai-341-musk-loses-to

### A Fireside Chat with Cat and Thariq from the Claude Code team
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-21T12:54
- **Score** : 2
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Earlier this month I hosted a fireside chat session at the AI Engineer World's Fair with Cat Wu and Thariq Shihipar from Anthropic's Claude Code team. We talked about Claude Code, Claude Tag, Fable, c...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/21/cat-and-thariq/#atom-everything

### Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
- **Source** : Hugging Face Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 08 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : ...
- **Lien** : https://huggingface.co/blog/native-speed-vllm-transformers-backend

### How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Thu, 16 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and bring agentic workflows to teams across the company....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/cars24

### How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Tue, 14 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/managing-ai-investments-in-agentic-era

### LWiAI Podcast #246 - Gemini 3.5 + Omni, Musk Loses, OpenAI vs ErdÅs
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 26 May 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Google unveils AI model Gemini 3.5 and AI agent Gemini Spark, Omni turns images, audio, and text into video, Musk loses OpenAI court battle...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-246-gemini-35-omni

### [AINews] Thinky's Inkling: 975B-A41B multimodal, new best American Apache 2.0 open model (with Inkling-Small, 276B-A12B)
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Thu, 16 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Thinky's first full LLM release is a banger and bonus: it's open weights!...
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/ainews-thinkys-inkling-975b-a41b

### 5 Trends That Defined AI Engineering at Worldâs Fair 2026
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Tue, 14 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : At this year's AIE World&#8217;s Fair, AI engineering entered a new phase: building systems around agents, rather than just building with agents....
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/aiewf26trends

### [AINews] Codex usage up >10x in 6 months to 7M users, +1M in the past ~day; did Codex overtake Claude Code??
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Tue, 14 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : a quiet day lets us fact check some numbers against the sound of silence of Claude Code reporting......
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/ainews-codex-usage-up-10x-in-6-months

### [AINews] OpenAI launches GPT 5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna, Codex becomes ChatGPT superapp
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Fri, 10 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : A big day for OpenAI....
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/ainews-openai-launches-gpt-56-solterraluna

### Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-21T14:22
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac
Prince Canuma is the developer behind the excellent MLX-VLM Python library for running vision-LLMs using MLX on a Mac.
I'm really ex...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/21/nativ/#atom-everything

### Reverse-engineering is cheap now
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-20T19:24
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : I keep hearing anecdotes from people who used coding agents to reverse-engineer and automate devices in their homes.
I think this is an interesting illustration of the impact of the reduced cost of wr...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/20/cheap-reverse-engineering/#atom-everything

### Claude Code uses Bun written in Rust now
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-19T03:54
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : In Rewriting Bun in Rust Jarred Sumner made the following claim:

Claude Code v2.1.181 (released June 17th) and later use the Rust port of Bun. Startup got 10% faster on Linux but otherwise, barely an...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/19/claude-code-in-bun-in-rust/#atom-everything

### Claude make Fable 5 permanent
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-18T06:00
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Claude make Fable 5 permanent
An update from the @claudeai account on Twitter:

Beginning July 20, Claude Fable 5 will be included in all Max and Team Premium plans, at 50% o...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/18/claude-make-fable-5-permanent/#atom-everything

### What building Shippy taught us about building agents
- **Source** : Hugging Face Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 15 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : ...
- **Lien** : https://huggingface.co/blog/allenai/shippy-tech-blog

### Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Tue, 21 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/introducing-chatgpt-small-business-program

### Why teens deserve access to safe AI
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Thu, 16 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/why-teens-deserve-access-safe-ai

### GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 15 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Explore GPT-Red, OpenAIâs automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/unlocking-self-improvement-gpt-red

### How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Tue, 14 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : See how sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/academy/codex-for-work/how-sales-teams-use-codex

### How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Tue, 14 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/academy/codex-for-work/how-data-science-teams-use-codex

### LWiAI Podcast #252 - GPT 5.6, Grok 4.5, Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion, AI 2040
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 21 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : GPT-5.6 and Grok 4.5, Meta's Muse Spark 1.1, regulatory developments in AI and data centers, interpretability research from Anthropic, and the future of AI policy with AI 2040...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-252-gpt-56-grok-45

### Last Week in AI #251 - Mythos Back, Sonnet 5, Etched, LongCat
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 21 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Trump lifts restrictions on Anthropic, Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5, Google's NotebookLM updates, chips stories from Etched and Baidu, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/last-week-in-ai-251-mythos-back-sonnet

### Last Week in AI #250 - Mythos Mess, GPT 5.6-Sol, GLM 5.2
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 21 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Anthropic's AI treaty discussions, US government's influence on AI model releases, OpenAI's processor development, memory market impacts, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/last-week-in-ai-250-mythos-mess-gpt

### LWiAI Podcast #248 - Opus 4.8, MAI, Anthropic IPO, Minimax-M3
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 21 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : Exploring Claude Fable 5&#8217;s impact, Siri AI&#8217;s latest enhancements, and the competitive IPO landscape shaping AI&#8217;s future...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-248-opus-48-mai-anthropic

### LWiAI Podcast #245 - TML-Interaction, Claude For Legal, Sam Altman on Stand
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Wed, 20 May 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **RÃĐsumÃĐ** : OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API, Thinking Machines drops a new, highly responsive model designed for humanlike interactions in real time, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-245-tml-interaction

<!-- BLOG_FEED_END -->
